Operation 'importFinancialTransactions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is extremely vague and repetitive. Improved version clarifies: (1) this is a batch/bulk import operation, (2) what input is expected (array of transaction objects), (3) what is returned (confirmation and errors), (4) the business context (reconciliation, migration), and (5) partial success behavior. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Import multiple financial transactions in batch
data.description_suggestion: Imports a batch of financial transactions from a provided list. Accepts an array of financial transaction objects and creates them in the system. Returns confirmation of successfully imported transactions and any validation errors for failed entries. This operation enables bulk transaction entry, useful for reconciling bank statements or migrating transaction data. Partial success is possible - some transactions may succeed while others fail validation.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague and repetitive. Improved version clarifies: (1) this is a batch/bulk import operation, (2) what input is expected (array of transaction objects), (3) what is returned (confirmation and errors), (4) the business context (reconciliation, migration), and (5) partial success behavior. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'createGLAccount' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Enhanced description provides these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and constraints.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new general ledger (GL) account in the chart of accounts. Accepts a GLAccount object with required properties such as account code, account name, and account type. Returns the created GLAccount object with assigned system identifier. The new account becomes immediately available for use in financial transactions and reporting. Duplicate account codes are rejected.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about inputs (what properties are required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (account becomes available, duplicates rejected). Enhanced description provides these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and constraints.

data.current_summary: Get the current active cash book
data.current_description: Get the current active cash book
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the currently active cashbook for the authenticated account. Returns the cashbook object containing configuration and status information. Use this to verify the active cashbook before performing cashbook operations.
data.reasoning: The description is repetitive and lacks detail about what data is returned and the operation's purpose in the workflow. Added context about authentication, return value details, and use case guidance for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Initialize the cash book for first use
data.current_description: Initialize the cash book for first use
data.description_suggestion: Initializes a new cashbook for the authenticated account for first-time use. Accepts CashbookInitialization parameters to configure the cashbook. Returns the newly created cashbook object. This operation sets up the initial state and must be called before adding entries. Only one active cashbook can exist per account.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and important side effects. Added details about parameter requirements, return value, initialization requirements, and the constraint about single active cashbook per account to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'closeCashbook' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal and doesn't convey the permanence, consequences, or workflow implications. data.description_suggestion: Permanently closes the currently active cashbook, preventing further entries from being added. This is an irreversible operation. Returns confirmation of the closure. After closing, a new cashbook must be initialized if continued use is required. Ensure all entries are finalized before closing.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and doesn't convey the permanence, consequences, or workflow implications. Added details about the irreversible nature, impact on future operations, return value, and guidance for AI agents to understand the significance of this action.

data.current_summary: Add an entry to the current active cash book

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook for an E-invoice registration to receive event notifications. Accepts a Webhook object in the request body specifying the endpoint URL and event types to subscribe to. The webhook will be registered and begin receiving notifications for the specified E-invoice events. Returns the created webhook object with its ID and configuration. Side effect: The system will begin sending HTTP POST requests to the specified endpoint when matching events occur.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks all critical details. Added domain context (E-invoice), clarified input requirements (Webhook object structure), explained what the operation does (registers webhook for events), specified return value, and documented the side effect of automatic event notifications to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and consequences.

data.summary_suggestion: Import multiple financial transactions in batch
data.description_suggestion: Imports a batch of financial transactions from a provided list. Accepts an array of financial transaction objects and creates them in the system. This operation enables bulk transaction entry, useful for reconciling bank statements or migrating transaction data. Partial success is possible - some transactions may succeed while others fail validation.
